CreateAssociationRelation.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](CSN/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
CreateAssociationRelation.csnRtId: The ID of the Cloud Smart Network route table
CreateAssociationRelation.attachId: The identity ID of the network instance in the Cloud Smart Network
